name: telegram_agent_max_ai
description: Connect your Claude agent to Telegram, step by step, no coding required. Two paths: run it locally on your computer (Claude Code Channels) or 24/7 on your own cloud server (Contabo VPS). Includes a one-command tool that fixes the part everyone gets stuck on - authenticating Claude on a headless server, and re-login when the token expires (the 401 error).
